[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Hupsquoch''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he served as a commanding officer of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] fleet under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]]. When Master Halcyon went planetside, Hupsquoch was ordered to destroy the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] in order to keep it out of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] hands.
